Title: Lithium Treatment of Alzheimer's Disease
Results_Summary: Improvement in attention and concentration sub-item; no global cognitive change

Title: LATTICE: Lithium to Delay Cognitive Decline
Lithium in Mild Alzheimer's Disease
Results_Summary: No cognitive improvement; increased BDNF; decreased GSK-3 activity in platelets (trend)

Title: Lithium in Amnestic MCI (Forlenza)
Primary_Outcome: ADAS-Cog + CDR-SB + CSF biomarkers at 2 years
Results_Summary: Cognitive stability vs placebo decline; decreased p-tau; increased Aβ42 in CSF

Title: LiMIND: Lithium in Mild Cognitive Impairment
